title: CleanChatPlus
description: CleanChat is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft that lets you hide and clean up chat with a keybind and smart filters. It removes chat clutter like command feedback and gamemode messages while offering a clean, professional settings UI via
body:
## 🧼 CleanChat

**CleanChat** is a lightweight, client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft that helps you keep your chat clean and distraction-free.

The mod allows you to **toggle chat visibility with a keybind**, making it easy to instantly hide or show chat whenever you want. It also includes smart filters to **hide command feedback** (such as `/give`, `/tp`, or `/gamemode` messages) and **suppress gamemode change messages**, reducing unnecessary chat clutter—especially useful in creative mode, testing worlds, or while recording.

CleanChat integrates directly with **Mod Menu** and uses **Cloth Config** to provide a clean, responsive, and professional settings screen where all features can be enabled or disabled with simple toggle switches. All settings are saved automatically and persist between game launches.

### ✨ Features
- Toggle chat visibility using a configurable keybind  
- Hide command feedback messages  
- Hide gamemode change messages  
- Clean settings UI via Mod Menu + Cloth Config  
- Client-side only (safe to use on servers)  

### 📦 Requirements
- Fabric Loader  
- Fabric API  
- Cloth Config (included as a dependency)  
- Mod Menu (recommended for settings access)
